courtClock.sourceName: National Judicial Data Grid - Supreme Court of India dashboard
courtClock.reportingPeriod: As captured from NJDG Supreme Court dashboard on 2026-06-18
notes: Supreme Court of India total pendency captured from the National Judicial Data Grid Supreme Court dashboard.
Civil/criminal split, institution YTD, disposal YTD, old-case count, and bench-size split were not available in the captured source and are not estimated.
The coram pending entry records the total under an unavailable bench-size label; it is not an official bench-size split.
